title: pyrrosia nummulariifolia var. rufa
intro: Pyrrosia nummulariifolia var. rufa, also known as the Red Coin Shield Fern, is a variety of the Pyrrosia nummulariifolia plant, which is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is said to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia nummulariifolia var. rufa include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its use in the treatment of various gastrointestinal problems. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, with the leaves being used in various forms, including fresh, dried, or powdered, to make these preparations.
